response.justification: Szabo is a technically excellent full-stack engineer with 20 years of continuous experience, strong software fundamentals, and proven ability to architect systems at scale (Dunnhumby's millions of requests/sec, Optilyz's high-volume operations). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, metrics infrastructure, or telemetry systems—core responsibilities of this Principal-level growth role. While his technical depth and leadership could enable rapid learning in these specialized domains, the absence of demonstrable experimentation or measurement platform experience represents a significant gap for an IC6 position focused on growth and experimentation systems.
strengths: 20 years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems; fluent in all required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, C#) with proven ability to architect production systems serving millions of operations

Strong technical leadership at staff-level positions with hands-on mentoring (Refactoring Dojos, workshops, Selenium courses) and multi-workstream system design across diverse technology stacks (GISCollective, microservices infrastructure)

Deep commitment to software craftsmanship with emphasis on testing fundamentals (TDD, fluent-asserts library, trial test runner) and quality-focused engineering practices demonstrated across 20-year career
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout automation—the primary technical focus of this Principal-level growth role

Missing data/metrics/telemetry domain expertise: no evidence of building telemetry infrastructure, metrics collection systems, statistical analysis, or experimentation quality frameworks required for 'high data aptitude'

No visible growth engineering or product analytics background; pricing optimization work at Optilyz is product-adjacent but lacks evidence of owning end-to-end experimentation systems, measurement platforms, or multi-team growth measurement
